title: Rebuild 'A Garden for Priya' interactive flower garden app

requirements.text: Create a full-screen entrance/landing screen with a soft radial gradient background (white to #f4ecd8), an italic subtitle 'A secret garden for Priya...' in muted grey, and a gold-bordered 'ENTER' button with uppercase letter-spacing styling. Clicking the button fades out and hides the landing screen, then fades in the main content.
acceptanceCriteria: Landing screen is displayed full-screen on initial load
Clicking ENTER fades out the landing page over ~1.2s then reveals main content
Button has gold border, uppercase letter-spacing, and hover effect that darkens background

requirements.text: Build the main content area (max-width 600px, centered) with: an italic serif heading 'For My Everything', a gold horizontal divider line, and a subtitle 'Tap each bloom to reveal my heart...' in small muted italic text.

quotes: Tap each bloom to reveal my heart...

acceptanceCriteria: Header displays italic serif h1 'For My Everything'
Gold 80px wide 1px divider renders below the heading
Subtitle text renders in small italic muted style

requirements.text: Implement a 3×2 flower grid containing 6 flower emoji items (🌹, 🌸, 🌷, 🌻, 🌼, 🌺). Each flower starts with a desaturated/sepia filter. When clicked, it reveals its message and gets marked as 'viewed' (full color, slightly scaled down). Hovering scales up and removes desaturation.
acceptanceCriteria: 6 flowers render in a 3-column grid
Flowers start with grayscale(60%) sepia(50%) filter
Clicking a flower marks it as viewed: full color + scale(0.9)
Hovering scales to 1.1 and removes desaturation

requirements.text: Implement a message display area (height 250px, scrollable) with double gold top and bottom borders. When a flower is clicked, display the corresponding message with a fade-in animation. The 6 messages must match exactly: (0) the long personal message about getting lost in her, voice as medicine, phone being taken; (1) 'Every time I think of you, I realize how lucky I am...'; (2) 'I wanted to find a way to tell you that the small things you do...'; (3) 'There is a quiet strength in you that I admire...'; (4) 'If I could give you one thing, it would be the ability to see yourself through my eyes...'; (5) 'This isn't just a message; it's a promise...'
acceptanceCriteria: Display area is 250px tall with vertical scroll and custom gold scrollbar
Clicking each flower renders its corresponding message with fade-in animation
All 6 message texts match the source exactly including emojis
Scroll resets to top when a new message is shown
Placeholder text 'Select a flower above' shows before any flower is clicked

requirements.text: Show a hidden pulsing 'For You, Priya ❤️' button (red/rose background, rounded pill shape, italic serif font, pulse animation) only after all 6 flowers have been viewed. Clicking it triggers a heart burst animation and reveals a final thank-you modal.
acceptanceCriteria: Surprise button is hidden until all 6 flowers are viewed
Button appears 800ms after the last flower is viewed
Button has a continuous pulse/glow animation
Clicking it triggers the heart burst and thank-you modal

requirements.text: Implement a heart burst particle animation: when triggered, spawn 100 ❤️/💖 emoji particles from the center of the screen that fly outward in random directions across the full viewport, fading out over 3 seconds, then remove themselves from the DOM.
acceptanceCriteria: 100 heart particles are spawned on button click
Particles originate from center and spread randomly across the full viewport
Particles scale up and fade out over 3s then are removed
Alternates between ❤️ and 💖 emojis

requirements.text: Show a centered modal overlay after triggering the surprise, displaying the thank-you message: '"Thank you for spending your valuable time with me. My cutee, I will be forever grateful to you for everything. I hope I've been able to make you feel special and bring a smile to your face today."' followed by '— I admire you more than words can say. —' and a gold '[ Close ]' button that dismisses the modal. Style with parchment background, gold border, rounded corners, and drop shadow.

quotes: Thank you for spending your valuable time with me

acceptanceCriteria: Modal appears centered on screen above the heart particles
Thank-you message text matches exactly
Close button dismisses the modal
Modal has parchment background, gold border, rounded corners, and box shadow

requirements.text: Apply a consistent parchment/gold/ink visual theme across the entire app: background color #fdfaf1 (parchment), primary text #3a3535 (ink), accent #c5a059 (gold), highlight #e74c3c (love/red). Use Georgia serif font throughout. Footer reads 'ETERNALLY YOURS' in small gold uppercase letter-spaced text.
acceptanceCriteria: CSS variables for parchment, ink, gold, and love colors are defined and used consistently
Georgia serif font is applied globally
Footer renders 'ETERNALLY YOURS' in small gold uppercase letter-spaced text at the bottom

constraints: All 6 message texts must be preserved exactly as provided in the HTML source, including emojis and line breaks
The thank-you modal text must match the source exactly
No backend logic is needed — all state is client-side only
nonGoals: No backend data persistence or API calls
No user authentication or Internet Identity integration
No additional pages beyond the landing screen and main garden
